assumptions: Mock thermodynamic values are seeded for deterministic test runs and must be replaced by cited values in production use.
Generic energy solver inferred `generic` duty structure from route metadata and composition-propagated unit state.

duties.notes: Net reactor thermal duty from the selected thermodynamic basis.

assumptions: Mock kinetic parameters are seeded values for workflow verification.
Residence time basis retained at 1.00 h.
Byproduct closure uses declared trace allocation because no explicit byproduct stoichiometry is available.
Generic material-balance engine uses a sequence-based flowsheet solver with explicit feed preparation, reaction, staged separations, recycle, and purge handling.
Sequence family inferred as `generic` from route separations and expanded into the stage path: feed_handling, reaction, primary_recovery, recycle_recovery_carbonate_loop_cleanup, purification.
Sectioned flowsheet topology is now emitted explicitly with 5 solved sections and stream roles for feed, recycle, side-draw, product, vent, and waste paths.
Unitwise composition propagation now aggregates solved inlet and outlet component state for each major unit before energy and equipment sizing.
Ethylene glycol cases retain strong water recycle inside the generic sequence solver to reflect dilution-intensive hydration practice.

calc_traces.title: Unitwise duty expansion
calc_traces.formula: duty_count = number of explicit unit duties in the solved energy envelope
calc_traces.notes: The generic energy solver now emits duty rows for each major process section rather than a single family-level total.

calc_traces.title: Thermal packet expansion
calc_traces.formula: packet_count = number of unitwise thermal packets carried into utility and equipment design
calc_traces.notes: These packets preserve unit-level hot and cold thermal interfaces downstream.

calc_traces.title: Packet-derived exchanger candidates
calc_traces.formula: candidate_count = number of packet-to-packet heat-recovery candidates
calc_traces.notes: These candidates seed utility-architecture selection and detailed exchanger sizing.

calc_traces.title: Composition-driven thermal basis
calc_traces.formula: Cp and latent-duty basis are derived from solved unit composition states and mixture-property packages
calc_traces.notes: The energy solver now consumes mixture-property packages first and only retains heuristics as a compatibility fallback.
